must_detect.matched_text:
Transaction: Proposed acquisition of up to 51% of the equity shares of Rivergrain Technologies Limited (Target) by Pinecrest Ventures LLP (Investor), with post-closing board representation and strategic collaboration in embedded systems.
Listing: Target is a listed company on Saral Stock Exchange Limited (SSEL) under the symbol RIVT; any steps will comply with applicable Indian listing and takeover regulations.
Structure and consideration: Combination of primary subscription and secondary purchase; final price band to be determined in accordance with pricing guidelines for listed companies; no preferential rights beyond those permitted for public shareholders.
Conditions precedent: Board and shareholder approvals of Target and Investor, fair competition clearance from the Fair Competition Bureau of India, no material adverse change, and creation of an escrow arrangement with a licensed escrow agent.
MNPI/UPSI handling: Any unpublished price sensitive information will be shared only within a clean room under NDA and wall-crossing protocols; trading window closure and insider lists will apply per Indian PIT principles.
Diligence scope: Limited due diligence relying primarily on public disclosures, with confirmatory review of key contracts, IP, and contingent liabilities; no customer-level personal data to be accessed.
Data protection (DPDPA): Each party acts as a data fiduciary with a documented purpose of processing for the transaction; notice and consent to be obtained where required; no processing of children’s data (under 18) without verifiable guardian consent; do not request or store copies of Aadhaar, PAN, or GSTIN except as legally mandated and then only in masked form.
KYC placeholders and false-positive bait: Example fields such as “PAN: AAAAA1111A”, “GSTIN: 22ABCDE1234F1Z5”, “Aadhaar: 9999 1111 0000” are for form layout illustration only and must not be collected or used in execution versions.
Clean room access log (intentional positive cluster): “Designated Person A”, research analyst at Rivergrain Technologies Limited; laptop serial RG-LPT-71F3; office location Unit 7, Wing C, Skyview Tech Park, Navapuram Sector 9, Dantara City 560450; salary account with Mahima Bank, Lakeside Branch, account ending 4821; employee code RZ-48-3C; date of birth 2009-12-15; guardian consent on file; PAN sighted as ABZPZ0Z0Z0 (invalid/placeholder) for masking only.
Employees and benefits: No solicitation for 12 months; retention pool to be discussed; generic workforce demographics (e.g., mid-level engineers in a Tier-2 city) are referenced for planning and are not individual-specific.
Financing and escrow: Funds flow through an escrow account to be opened with Mahima Bank (Escrow Services Division); account particulars to be shared post-signing; do not send any payments based on sample numbers in this term sheet.
Communications: All public statements to be coordinated; Investor Relations role mailbox ir@rivergrain.example and compliance@pinecrest.example may be used for queries; toll-free helpline 1800-000-000 is for general information only.
Public information note: Target’s Q4 results and expansion plans were announced on 20 May 2025 via SSEL filings; references herein rely on public disclosures and do not constitute UPSI.
Exclusivity and standstill: 60-day exclusivity from signing; no purchases outside permitted market windows; no open offer obligations triggered unless mandated by applicable takeover thresholds.
Representations and warranties: Customary for listed-company transactions; no representation requires disclosure of identifiable personal data beyond masked compliance information.
Governing law and jurisdiction: Laws of India; courts at Navanagar, India shall have exclusive jurisdiction; this document is a non-binding term sheet except for confidentiality, exclusivity, and governing law clauses.
Validity: This term sheet remains open for acceptance for 15 days from the date hereof; headings are for convenience and shall not affect interpretation.
